title: flaky pungent mediterranean bread rolls flatbread
description: savor the flavors of the mediterranean with these flaky, pungent, and aromatic bread rolls, perfect for a date-night dinner
instructions: mix turmeric, ghee, garlic, and lemon juice in a small bowl
add the mixture to the dough and knead for 5 minutes
form the dough into 4-6 rolls depending on desired size
place the rolls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper
drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with sea salt
bake in a preheated oven at 400f for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown
let the rolls cool for 10 minutes before serving
top with chilled coconut cream and garnish with fresh herbs like parsley or cilantro
note: the coconut cream will be puffed and slightly caramelized after baking
additional notes: use high-quality ingredients like unsalted butter and real coconut cream for the best flavor
coconut cream can be refrigerated for up to 5 days
rolls can be stored in an airtight container for up to 3 days
